name: Radio
description: A radio button component for mutually exclusive selections with support for radio groups and controlled/uncontrolled states.
usage_guidelines: Use for mutually exclusive options where only one can be selected.
Group related radio buttons using RadioGroup component.
Provide clear labels as children for accessibility.
Use controlled (checked prop) or uncontrolled (defaultChecked) based on needs.
Set value prop when using within RadioGroup.

radioClass.description: CSS classes for radio input element.

defaultChecked.description: Default checked state for uncontrolled component.

name.description: Input name attribute for form submission.

onChange.description: Callback fired when radio state changes.

value.description: Radio value used in radio groups.

styling_info.visual_description: A circular radio button with inner dot when selected. Uses primary color for checked state. Includes smooth transitions and hover effects.

Dont: Don't use for multi-select (use Checkbox instead)
Don't use both checked and defaultChecked

import Radio from '@/components/ui/Radio' const Color = () => { return (
Radio
Apple Banana Cherry
) } export default Color
